##RRUFFID=R070349

##LOCALITY=Tvedalen, Larvik, Vestfold, Norway
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Aggregate of pale yellow to orange thin spearhead-shaped blades associated with orthoclase and intimately with analcime
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R070349
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(Ca_0.91_Na_0.09_)(Mn^2+^_0.80_Fe^2+^_0.20_)((Be_0.94_Al_0.06_)OH)_2_(Si_4.61_Al_0.39_)(O_12.76_(OH)_0.24_)·2H_2_O ; light phase: Be by charge balance  dark: (Na_0.99_Mn_0.01_)(Si_1.99_Al_2.01_)O_6_·H_2_O is an
